# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, please report it responsibly.

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Instead, please open a [GitHub Security Advisory](https://github.com/ElJijuna/query-client/security/advisories/new) or contact the maintainer directly.

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide a fix or mitigation plan within 7 days for confirmed vulnerabilities.
